zhRisk: 供應鏈風險 / SUPPLY CHAIN：GB300 NVL72為新世代高需求產品，需提前12個月鎖單並設備用方案。
zhRisk_en: Supply Chain Risk / SUPPLY CHAIN: GB300 NVL72 is a next-generation high-demand product; orders must be locked 12 months in advance with a contingency supply plan.
zhRisk_zh-Hans: 供应链风险 / SUPPLY CHAIN：GB300 NVL72为新世代高需求产品，需提前12个月锁单并设备用方案。
mitigation: 鎖單+備份方案（HGX B300擴容）
mitigation_en: Order lock + backup plan (HGX B300 capacity expansion)
mitigation_zh-Hans: 锁单+备份方案（HGX B300扩容）
